mnemonics.title: ROOTS PLANT DEEP
mnemonics.content: Root, Parent, Leaf, Node, Tree, Depth, Edge, Level, Path - Key terms sequence

mnemonics.title: NO LOOPS
mnemonics.content: Trees Never Allow Cycles (critical tree property)

mnemonics.title: In PRE, root comes PREsently
mnemonics.content: Pre-order traversal: Root first, then left, then right

mnemonics.title: LZC Nodes
mnemonics.content: Leaf nodes have Zero Children (easy identification)

acronyms.expansion: Root, One parent, Ordered hierarchy, Tree structure

visualTips.visualization: Imagine an upside-down tree where roots are at the top
Picture actual tree leaves - no connections extending downward
Depth: Count down from root (like submarine depth). Height: Count up from leaves (like building height)
Visualize as building floors - root at ground level, each child node on higher floors

analogies.analogy: Organization chart: CEO (root), managers (internal nodes), employees (leaves)
Family tree: You (child node) connected to parents and grandparents (ancestor nodes)
DNA structure: Each node (parent) splits into two branches (children)
